_comment: Example Claude Code hooks for an economics research project. Place at .claude/settings.json (project) or ~/.claude/settings.json (global). Hooks are shell commands that run automatically around tool calls; see https://docs.claude.com/en/docs/claude-code/hooks.

PostToolUse._comment: Recompile LaTeX whenever Claude edits a .tex file in paper/.

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -E '^paper/.*\.tex$' | xargs -r -I{} sh -c 'cd paper && latexmk -pdf -interaction=nonstopmode main.tex > .latexmk.log 2>&1 || echo "latexmk failed, see paper/.latexmk.log"'

PostToolUse._comment: Run ruff on every Python file Claude writes or edits.

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -E '\.py$' | xargs -r ruff check --fix

PostToolUse._comment: Append every file Claude touched to an audit log. Note: only logs file paths; full Bash commands are deliberately NOT captured to avoid leaking secrets (API keys in env vars, tokens in URLs, etc.) into .claude/audit.log.

PreToolUse._comment: Block edits to data/raw/ at the system level. Uses the current PreToolUse schema (hookSpecificOutput / permissionDecision); the older 'decision: block' form was deprecated in 2025.

hooks.command: jq -e '.tool_input.file_path | test("^data/raw/")' > /dev/null && { echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"data/raw/ is read-only per CLAUDE.md"}}'; exit 0; } || exit 0

Stop._comment: Auto-commit any staged work when the session ends.

hooks.command: git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m 'claude: session auto-commit'
